name: toast
title: Toast
description: A non-intrusive notification toast with variants and auto-dismiss support.

docs.overview: Toast displays brief, non-blocking notifications to the user. Use for confirmations, success messages, and error alerts. Supports auto-dismiss via a configurable duration and manual dismiss via a close button.
docs.usage: Toast({ title: 'Saved', description: 'Your changes have been saved.', variant: 'success' })
docs.accessibility: Uses aria-live for screen reader announcements. Polite for default and success toasts, assertive for destructive toasts.

platformNotes.macos: Renders as a VStack with native styling and shadow.
platformNotes.web: Renders as a styled container div with aria-live attributes.

props.name: description
props.description: Optional body text below the title

examples.name: default
examples.title: Default Toast
examples.code: Toast({ title: 'Event created', description: 'Monday, January 3rd at 6:00 PM' })

examples.name: success
examples.title: Success Toast
examples.code: Toast({ title: 'Changes saved', description: 'Your profile has been updated.', variant: 'success' })

examples.name: destructive
examples.title: Destructive Toast
examples.code: Toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save changes. Please try again.', variant: 'destructive' })

examples.name: custom-duration
examples.title: Custom Duration Toast
examples.code: Toast({ title: 'Uploading...', description: 'This will disappear in 10 seconds.', duration: 10000 })

examples.name: with-provider
examples.title: Toast with Provider

agent.summary: Toast displays brief, non-blocking notifications to the user with support for variants and auto-dismiss.
useWhen: Displaying error messages without blocking the UI
Showing status updates or progress notifications
doNotUseWhen: Critical errors requiring immediate user action (use Alert instead)
Persistent information that needs to stay on screen (use Card or inline text)
layoutHints: Wrap multiple toasts in ToastProvider for automatic stacking
Position ToastProvider at the bottom-right or top-right of the viewport
Use destructive variant sparingly for genuine errors
accessibilityChecklist: Title text should be concise and descriptive
Destructive toasts use assertive aria-live for immediate announcement
Dismiss button has an accessibility label
